articles.title: How Lampard's own revival ended Coventry's 25-year wait
articles.summary: Frank Lampard and Coventry City are back in the big time. This is how the former England international guided the Sky Blues to the Premier League.

articles.title: Hunger and desire the 'vitamin' for Arsenal fans' tension
articles.summary: Arsenal were booed off after their Premier League defeat by Bournemouth - and boss Mikel Arteta will not want tension to seep on to the pitch against Manchester City.

articles.title: How Coventry earned Premier League return after 25 years
articles.summary: After a quarter of a century out of the Premier League, groundshares and administration, Frank Lampard has led Coventry City back to the top flight.

articles.title: Celtic 'not good enough' for O'Neill to dream of cup glory
articles.summary: A revenge mission against St Mirren in the Scottish Cup semi-finals could set up Martin O'Neill for a huge farewell - but the interim Celtic manager is reluctant to look that far ahead.

articles.title: Coventry promotion special and unique - Lampard

articles.title: Guardiola says he enjoys watching Arsenal play
articles.summary: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says he enjoys watching Arsenal play as he can "learn a lot" from them.

articles.title: Guardiola proud to be challenging Arsenal for title
articles.summary: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola said the title race is "over" with six games to play if they lose to Arsenal on Sunday but there are still "many things to do".

articles.title: The rollercoaster race for second spot - who's going up with Coventry?

articles.summary: Fulham boss Marco Silva's appeal against a one-match touchline ban and £90,000 fine is partially upheld by an independent appeal board.

articles.summary: An emotional Frank Lampard says earning promotion to the Premier League as Coventry boss is “right up there” among the best achievements of his glittering career.
